engine_description.description: A brief description of the Amazon DocumentDB engine version.

exportable_log_types.description: A list of log types that can be exported for the specified engine version.

id.description: The identifier for the specific DocumentDB engine version.

parameter_group_family.description: The parameter group family associated with the engine version.

supports_log_exports_to_cloudwatch.description: Indicates whether the engine version supports exporting logs to CloudWatch.

valid_upgrade_targets.description: A list of engine versions that are valid targets for upgrading from the current version.

version.description: The specific version number of the Amazon DocumentDB engine.

version_description.description: A detailed description of the features and updates included in the engine version.
